active_profile_source: S00/S02 active profile with S01 evidence readiness
downstream_design_force: S04 receives claim candidates and forbidden options

failure_severity_policy.BLOCKING: unsupported contribution promoted as claim candidate
failure_severity_policy.MAJOR: reviewer attack map not converted into downstream obligations
failure_severity_policy.MINOR: local trace, label, or wording defect that does not alter authority
failure_severity_policy.WATCH: potential reviewer risk tracked without forced full rerun

nearest_responsible_stage_policy: S03 for contribution framing and attack-map defects
anti_over_strictness_boundary: MINOR and WATCH findings enter local revision or risk ledger; they do not force full downstream rerun by default.
